overview.description: The fund invests at least 80% of its net assets in FLexible EXchange® Options ("FLEX Options") that reference the SPDR® S&P 500® ETF Trust. FLEX Options are exchange-traded options contracts with uniquely customizable terms. It is non-diversified.
